justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "next Wednesday," "earlier on Wednesday," "Tuesday, June 2nd," and "Thursday, June 4th, in the morning."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and expanded the search to new days as requested by the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent combining information gathering and never asking for information the user had already provided.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any issues.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after the initial unavailability, maintaining full context and intelligently expanding the search based on user preferences.
